text.title: Deploy Notes Template with Rollback Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a Deploy Notes Template with Rollback artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo founder deploys a Stripe webhook update at 16:00 Friday. Notes pin SHA abc1234, blast=[/webhooks/stripe, payments_log table], rollback=`git revert abc1234 && deploy`, window=24h, verification=[curl /health → 200, payments_log row count > 0 after 5 test events].

list.item: Step 1 — prerequisites_ok=true; all input refs reachable.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.
Step 4 — validator script exits 0; no violations.

section.title: Outcome
section.p: The artefact is auditable by a downstream reviewer without re-deriving the reasoning. Every non-trivial field traces back to an evidence row; rejected fields surface as structured skip-with-reason instead of polluting the library with degraded output.
